title: Inception
description: A thief enters dreams to steal secrets and plant an idea.

title: Interstellar
description: Explorers travel through a wormhole to save humanity.

description: Batman faces the Joker in Gotham City.

title: The Matrix
description: A hacker discovers reality is a simulation.

title: Forrest Gump

description: Two prisoners form a friendship over decades.

title: Pulp Fiction

title: Fight Club

title: The Godfather
description: The aging patriarch transfers control of a mafia empire.

description: A hobbit begins a quest to destroy a powerful ring.

description: The fellowship is broken while war grows in Middle-earth.

title: Gladiator

title: Titanic

description: A musician and an actress fall in love in Los Angeles.

title: Whiplash
description: A young drummer trains under an intense instructor.

title: Parasite
description: A poor family infiltrates a wealthy household.

title: Dune
description: A noble family fights for control of a desert planet.

description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, rebels escape a tyrant.

title: Spirited Away
